contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 50
- Description: Verify batch-QR Edgar pipeline live + repoint QR PNG storage off the archived qr_codes repo
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/373
  
  Details:
  Live end-to-end test of the batch-QR pipeline through Edgar: submitted one real batch QR request (Cacao Tea 1LB Oscar x1, signed Gary Teh); Edgar dispatched and the GAS processor minted QR 2024_20260622_22 (row 1611, MINTED) and fired the render webhook -- the Edgar hook is confirmed working end to end. The render then surfaced a separate failure: the tokenomics render workflow uploads compiled PNGs to TrueSightDAO/qr_codes, which was archived (read-only) on 2026-06-11, so every render 403s and no PNG is produced. Repointed PNG storage to the canonical lineage-assets/pngs home (the workflow derives repo and path from the column-K URL via parse_github_url, so the GAS constant is the single source of truth): updated the 1N6o00 GAS consts, the workflow GITHUB_REPOSITORY default, and the handler fallback; redeployed the GAS deployment to v9. Verified via workflow_dispatch on row 1611 that the target resolves to lineage-assets and the PNG renders. One blocker remains for the operator: the QR_CODE_REPOSITORY_TOKEN secret is a fine-grained PAT scoped to qr_codes and returns 403 'Resource not accessible by personal access token' on lineage-assets -- it needs Contents write on lineage-assets. Documented in the postmortem, CONTEXT_UPDATES, and two OPEN_FOLLOWUPS (token grant + manifest/index emission).
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 83.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
